zsh.c(3) Library Functions Manual zsh.c(3)

NAME

zsh.c - Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE *output)

Detailed Description

Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

Definition in file zsh.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE * output)

Definition at line 131 of file zsh.c.

131                                                          {
132   if (!output) {
133     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Output stream cannot be NULL");
134   }
135 
136   fprintf(output, "#compdef _ascii_chat ascii-chat\n"
137 #ifndef NDEBUG
138                   "#compdef _ascii_chat build/bin/ascii-chat ./build/bin/ascii-chat\n"
139 #endif
140                   "# Zsh completion script for ascii-chat\n"
141                   "# Generated from options registry - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\n"
142                   "\n"
143                   "_ascii_chat() {\n"
144                   "  # If first arg is a flag (starts with -), go straight to args completion\n"
145                   "  if [[ ${words[2]} == -* ]]; then\n"
146                   "    _ascii_chat_args\n"
147                   "    return\n"
148                   "  fi\n"
149                   "  local curcontext=\"$curcontext\" state line modes\n"
150                   "  _arguments \\\n"
151                   "    '1:mode:->mode' \\\n"
152                   "    '*::args:_ascii_chat_args'\n"
153                   "  case $state in\n"
154                   "    mode)\n"
155                   "      local -a server_modes client_modes\n"
156                   "      server_modes=(\n");
157 
158   /* Generate server-like modes from registry */
159   size_t mode_server_count = 0;
160   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_server_descs = get_modes_by_group("server-like", &mode_server_count);
161   if (mode_server_descs) {
162     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_server_count; i++) {
163       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_server_descs[i].name, mode_server_descs[i].description);
164     }
165     SAFE_FREE(mode_server_descs);
166   }
167 
168   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
169                   "      client_modes=(\n");
170 
171   /* Generate client-like modes from registry (exclude discovery since it's the default mode) */
172   size_t mode_client_count = 0;
173   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_client_descs = get_modes_by_group("client-like", &mode_client_count);
174   if (mode_client_descs) {
175     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_client_count; i++) {
176       /* Skip discovery mode - it's the default when no mode is specified */
177       if (strcmp(mode_client_descs[i].name, "discovery") == 0) {
178         continue;
179       }
180       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_client_descs[i].name, mode_client_descs[i].description);
181     }
182     SAFE_FREE(mode_client_descs);
183   }
184 
185   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
186                   "      _describe -t server-modes 'server-like modes' server_modes\n"
187                   "      _describe -t client-modes 'client-like modes' client_modes\n"
188                   "      ;;\n"
189                   "  esac\n"
190                   "}\n"
191                   "\n"
192                   "_ascii_chat_args() {\n"
193                   "  case $words[2] in\n"
194                   "    # Server-like modes\n"
195                   "    server)\n"
196                   "      _ascii_chat_server\n"
197                   "      ;;\n"
198                   "    discovery-service)\n"
199                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery_service\n"
200                   "      ;;\n"
201                   "\n"
202                   "    # Client-like modes\n"
203                   "    client)\n"
204                   "      _ascii_chat_client\n"
205                   "      ;;\n"
206                   "    mirror)\n"
207                   "      _ascii_chat_mirror\n"
208                   "      ;;\n"
209                   "\n"
210                   "    *)\n"
211                   "      # Default mode (discovery)\n"
212                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
213                   "      ;;\n"
214                   "  esac\n"
215                   "}\n"
216                   "\n"
217                   "# Server-like modes: handle incoming connections and stream management\n"
218                   "_ascii_chat_server() {\n");
219 
220   /* Server options - grouped by category */
221   size_t server_count = 0;
222   const option_descriptor_t *server_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_SERVER, false, &server_count);
223 
224   if (server_opts) {
225     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, server_opts, server_count, "server");
226     SAFE_FREE(server_opts);
227   }
228 
229   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
230                   "}\n"
231                   "\n"
232                   "_ascii_chat_discovery_service() {\n");
233 
234   /* Discovery-service options - grouped by category */
235   size_t discovery_svc_count = 0;
236   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_svc_opts =
237       options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE, false, &discovery_svc_count);
238 
239   if (discovery_svc_opts) {
240     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_svc_opts, discovery_svc_count, "discovery_service");
241     SAFE_FREE(discovery_svc_opts);
242   }
243 
244   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
245                   "}\n"
246                   "\n"
247                   "# Client-like modes: connect to servers or render local media\n"
248                   "_ascii_chat_client() {\n");
249 
250   /* Client options - grouped by category */
251   size_t client_count = 0;
252   const option_descriptor_t *client_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_CLIENT, false, &client_count);
253 
254   if (client_opts) {
255     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, client_opts, client_count, "client");
256     SAFE_FREE(client_opts);
257   }
258 
259   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
260                   "}\n"
261                   "\n"
262                   "_ascii_chat_mirror() {\n");
263 
264   /* Mirror options - grouped by category */
265   size_t mirror_count = 0;
266   const option_descriptor_t *mirror_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_MIRROR, false, &mirror_count);
267 
268   if (mirror_opts) {
269     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, mirror_opts, mirror_count, "mirror");
270     SAFE_FREE(mirror_opts);
271   }
272 
273   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
274                   "}\n"
275                   "\n"
276                   "# Discovery mode: find sessions via discovery service (default mode when no mode specified)\n"
277                   "_ascii_chat_discovery() {\n");
278 
279   /* For discovery mode, get all options (binary + mode-specific) in a single call */
280   size_t discovery_count = 0;
281   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY, true, &discovery_count);
282 
283   if (discovery_opts) {
284     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_opts, discovery_count, "discovery");
285     SAFE_FREE(discovery_opts);
286   }
287 
288   // Return after all option sets are described (prevents zsh fallback completion)
289   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
290                   "}\n"
291                   "\n"
292                   "_ascii_chat \"$@\"\n");
293 
294   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
295 }




References get_modes_by_group(), and
    options_registry_get_for_display().


Referenced by completions_generate_for_shell().
